list.name: sku
list.label: SKU
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT sku FROM sku_runs ORDER BY sku

targets.rawSql: SELECT fr.completed_at AS time, sr.sku AS metric, sr.winning_mae AS value FROM sku_runs sr JOIN forecast_runs fr USING (run_id) WHERE sr.sku IN (${sku:sqlstring}) AND sr.winning_mae IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(fr.completed_at) ORDER BY fr.completed_at

WITH last_run AS (SELECT run_id FROM forecast_runs WHERE status='completed' ORDER BY completed_at DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT sku, winning_mae FROM sku_runs WHERE run_id = (SELECT run_id FROM last_run) ORDER BY winning_mae DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 20
WITH r AS (SELECT run_id FROM forecast_runs WHERE status='completed' ORDER BY completed_at DESC LIMIT 5) SELECT AVG(winning_mae) AS avg_mae FROM sku_runs WHERE run_id IN (SELECT run_id FROM r)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT sku) AS skus FROM sku_runs WHERE status='completed'
